observation_note: Students are still hesitant to plan. Most start speaking immediately.
Introduced the digital microlearning prompts. Some students find it helpful.
Increased focus on monitoring. Students start noticing their own mistakes.
More students are pausing naturally before they start their tasks.
Reflection phase is becoming a routine. Less guidance needed.
Students are helping each other using the prompts provided.
Clear progress in voluntary reflection after speaking tasks.
Metacognitive routines are well-established. High engagement.
